title: Leather Stocking: The Last of the Mohicans
actors: Emil Mamelok, Herta Heden, Bela Lugosi
plot: Cora and Alice Munro, daughters of Lieutenant Colonel Munro, are traveling with Major Duncan Heyward from Fort Edward to Fort William Henry, where Munro is in command, and acquire another companion in David Gamut, a naiive singing...
